_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: Surface step prompts in dashboard (Prompt column + modal viewer)

steps.description: Database: add prompt_text + fix_prompt_text (TEXT NULL) to StepRun ORM model; alembic autogenerate revision adding both columns to step_runs.
Per-agent review of S01: schema correctness, nullable defaults, ORM model fidelity, append-only invariant on step_runs unaffected, migration upgrade/downgrade symmetry.
QV: Alembic migration round-trip + drift check

Backend: at the three StepRun() creation sites in orch/daemon/batch_manager.py (initial runs) and one site in orch/daemon/fix_cycle.py (fix-cycle retry), read the prompt file content at launch time and pass prompt_text= and/or fix_prompt_text= when constructing the StepRun. Existing prompt_file path columns remain unchanged.

Per-agent review of S04: confirm prompt content is captured at the correct site, IO error handling does not break step launch, fix-cycle retry sets fix_prompt_text and preserves prompt_text for traceability.

API: add GET /project/{project_id}/item/{item_id}/step/{step_id}/prompt-modal route in dashboard/routers/items.py returning a Jinja fragment. Extend StepDetail dataclass with has_prompt: bool. Enforce project_id + item_id scoping (404 on mismatch).

Per-agent review of S06: route signature consistency with sibling item routes, 404 semantics, fragment template does NOT extend base.html, query joins StepRun rows correctly for fix-cycle aggregation.

Frontend: add Prompt column between Model and Status in dashboard/templates/fragments/item_steps_table.html (header + cell with View button or '—'). Create dashboard/templates/fragments/prompt_text_modal.html as the htmx target. Add CSS (.prompt-modal-* or reuse .activity-modal-*) and JS (focus trap, Escape, backdrop dismiss, copy via window.iwClipboard.copy).

Per-agent review of S08: column ordering matches design, htmx attributes correct, fragment template has no <html> wrapper, JS uses iwClipboard helper (NOT navigator.clipboard.writeText), no Jinja %-format vs .format mismatch (I-00075).
Cross-agent final review of S01..S09 (implementation cross-cut): daemon writes → DB columns → dashboard route reads → template renders → JS opens. End-to-end integration before tests are written.

Tests: unit (StepRun column accept NULL + values); integration (daemon snapshots prompt content at launch for both initial and fix-cycle StepRun rows); dashboard TestClient (route returns 200 with fragment, 404 on project mismatch, 404 on missing prompt, ARIA attributes present); template render assertions for new column order.
Per-agent review of S11: AC coverage matrix (every AC mapped to at least one test), assertion strength, FakeLLM not needed (no LLM calls in this CR), no live-DB writes, test isolation.
Final cross-agent review including tests: implementation × tests round-trip, production-readiness for daemon hot-path changes.
QV: Linting
QV: Assertion scanner
QV: Formatting
QV: Type checking
QV: Unit tests
QV: Integration tests
QV: Diff coverage
QV: Secret scan

QV: Browser verification — Prompt column visible between Model and Status; View button opens modal with prompt text; Escape, backdrop, and close-button all dismiss; focus returns to trigger; fix-cycle stacking; copy-to-clipboard works; synthetic-step rows show '—'; no regressions on adjacent item-detail tabs.
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill (focus on multi-layer cross-cut between DB column add, daemon write site, dashboard route, template, and JS).
